summary: The diff implements most of REQ-24: the Header component now displays the logo image, and all three login pages (ClientLogin, MasterLogin, StaffLogin) show the logo above the form heading. However, the actual static asset file frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png is not present in the diff (no added files), meaning the image file itself was not saved as required.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 added files and no binary/image asset was committed. The PNG file at frontend/public/assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png is not present in the diff, so the acceptance criterion 'The logo image is served from /assets/generated/luid-logo.dim_256x256.png' cannot be verified as satisfied.
